mapper.select:
WITH RECURSIVE dept_tree AS ( SELECT d.deptId, d.parentDeptId, d.deptCode, d.deptName, d.deptLevel, d.sortOrder, d.useYn, CAST(d.deptId AS CHAR(1000)) AS treePath, 0 AS depth FROM dept_info d WHERE d.parentDeptId IS NULL UNION ALL SELECT d.deptId, d.parentDeptId, d.deptCode, d.deptName, d.deptLevel, d.sortOrder, d.useYn, CONCAT(dt.treePath, ' > ', d.deptId) AS treePath, dt.depth + 1 AS depth FROM dept_info d INNER JOIN dept_tree dt ON d.parentDeptId = dt.deptId ) SELECT dt.deptId, dt.parentDeptId, dt.deptCode, dt.deptName, dt.deptLevel, dt.sortOrder, dt.useYn, dt.treePath, CONCAT(REPEAT(' ', dt.depth), dt.deptName) AS deptNameTree, dt.depth FROM dept_tree dt
AND dt.deptId LIKE CONCAT('%', #{deptId}, '%')
AND dt.deptName LIKE CONCAT('%', #{deptName}, '%')
AND dt.deptCode LIKE CONCAT('%', #{deptCode}, '%')
ORDER BY dt.treePath, dt.sortOrder
mapper.insert: INSERT INTO dept_info (deptId, parentDeptId, deptCode, deptName, deptLevel, sortOrder, useYn) VALUES (#{deptId}, #{parentDeptId}, #{deptCode}, #{deptName}, #{deptLevel}, #{sortOrder}, #{useYn})
mapper.update: UPDATE dept_info SET parentDeptId = #{parentDeptId}, deptCode = #{deptCode}, deptName = #{deptName}, deptLevel = #{deptLevel}, sortOrder = #{sortOrder}, useYn = #{useYn}, updatedDate = NOW() WHERE deptId = #{deptId}
mapper.select: SELECT COUNT(*) FROM dept_info WHERE deptId = #{deptId}
SELECT COUNT(*) FROM dept_info WHERE parentDeptId = #{deptId}
SELECT COUNT(*) FROM user_info WHERE deptId = #{deptId}
SELECT COUNT(*) FROM dept_info WHERE deptCode = #{deptCode}
SELECT CONCAT('DEPT', LPAD(COALESCE(MAX(CAST(SUBSTRING(deptId, 5) AS UNSIGNED)), 0) + 1, 3, '0')) FROM dept_info WHERE deptId REGEXP '^DEPT[0-9]+$'
